investigate why it doesnt work

Here's the full picture:

**The login flow itself is correctly wired up.** The UAT site at `kashboard-uat.vercel.app` uses the right Auth0 domain, client ID, audience, and redirect URI (`window.location.origin = https://kashboard-uat.vercel.app`). When a user clicks Login, Auth0 correctly accepts the request and routes to its login page — no callback mismatch, no configuration errors.

**The UAT backend is live and responding correctly.** `finance-uat.165.227.42.130.nip.io` is online, HTTPS is w

The UAT login loops back to the login page after Auth0 redirect. The fix: in the frontend code, change the Auth0 redirectUri from window.location.origin to window.location.origin + '/callback'. Then redeploy kashboard-uat to Vercel and push to GitHub.

Clear picture. Here are the findings:

**There is no `/callback` in this app — and there doesn't need to be.** The frontend uses `window.location.origin` as the redirect URI, which means it sends just the root domain (`https://kashboard-uat.vercel.app`) to Auth0 — no `/callback` path. After login, Auth0 redirects the user back to the root of the site, and the Auth0 React SDK handles the token exchange automatically on that page load. This is the standard and correct setup for a single-page app.
